description: Mamlūk-era tax (kharāj) register for the town of Minyat Khamīs. The document is probably dated 11 Jumādā l-Ākhar 706 H. Mentions names of some state officials "al-maqām al-ashraf al-karīm al-ʿālī [] al-amīrī al-kabīrī al-makhzūmī al-ṣafawī jawhar al-sāfī al-ashrafī". The tax collector is al-ḥaj al-saʿīd ...
